vascular-phase-net.title: Vascular Phase-Net
vascular-phase-net.problem_summary: Mitigating bias in physiological AI models by extracting localized ID pulse waves from video input, avoiding talking-induced artifacts.
vascular-phase-net.full_description: Built a hybrid neural network fusing a 1D-CNN and a Cross-Attention Transformer Encoder. Optimized training on resource-constrained GPUs using PyTorch Mixed Precision.

continual-learning.title: Continual Learning AI Image Detector
continual-learning.short_desc: Continuous MLOps pipeline for AI-generated image detection.
continual-learning.problem_summary: Architected a Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) Active Learning system to automatically intercept and batch predictions for rapid administrator labeling.
continual-learning.full_description: Fused Efficient Net for spatial artifacts and DeiT-Tiny Vision Transformers for global inconsistencies. Built an interactive Streamlit frontend with a Dual-Lens Explainability Viewer.

risk-aware-trading.title: Risk-Aware Algorithmic Trading
risk-aware-trading.short_desc: High-frequency DRL trading agent using Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO).
risk-aware-trading.problem_summary: Mitigating catastrophic drawdowns during high-volatility market cycles.
risk-aware-trading.full_description: Formulated the trading environment as a Markov Decision Process (MDP) using multi-modal state spaces. Engineered a Reward Shaping Function incorporating a dynamic Risk Penalty.

agrovedha.title: AgroVedha
agrovedha.problem_summary: Integrating deep learning for real-time agro-climatic monitoring and predictive analytics.
agrovedha.full_description: Designed a dual-model predictive engine implementing LSTM networks for time-series forecasting and Random Forest for multi-class health state classification. Integrated an ESP32-driven hardware layer via Firebase.
